name: trulens-semconv

metadata.name: trulens-semconv
metadata.summary: Semantic conventions for spans produced by TruLens.

documentation:
# Semantic Conventions for TruLens Spans

This package describes the conventions for attribute names and some attribute values present in spans produced or interpreted by TruLens.

modules.name: trulens.semconv.trace
documentation:
Semantic conventions for TruLens spans.

This file should not have any dependencies except possibly other semantic
conventions packages so it can be easily imported by tools that want to read
TruLens data but not use TruLens otherwise.

Relevant links:

- [OTEL Semantic Conventions](https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/).

- [OTEL Trace Semantic
  Conventions](https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/general/trace/).

- [OTEL Semantic Conventions for Generative AI
  Systems](https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/gen-ai/).

classes.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes

inner_classes.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.SpanType

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.SpanType.UNKNOWN
documentation: Unknown span type.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.SpanType.CUSTOM
documentation: Spans created by the user using otel api.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.SpanType.RECORDING
documentation: Span encapsulating a TruLens app recording context.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.SpanType.SEMANTIC
documentation:
Recognized span, at least to some degree.

Must include at least one of the semantic mixable types below as well.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.SpanType.RECORD_ROOT
documentation: Spans as collected by tracing system.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.SpanType.EVAL_ROOT
documentation: Feedback function evaluation span.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.SpanType.RECORD
documentation: A span in a record.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.SpanType.CALL
documentation: A function call.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.SpanType.COST
documentation: A span with a cost.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.SpanType.RETRIEVAL
documentation: A retrieval.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.SpanType.RERANKING
documentation: A reranker call.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.SpanType.GENERATION
documentation: A generation call to an LLM.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.SpanType.MEMORIZATION
documentation: A memory call.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.SpanType.EMBEDDING
documentation: An embedding call.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.SpanType.TOOL_INVOCATION
documentation: A tool invocation.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.SpanType.AGENT_INVOCATION
documentation: An agent invocation.

Span type attribute values.

The root types indicate the process that initiating the tracking of
spans (either app tracing or feedback evaluation). Call indicates a
method/function call. App indicates a call by an app method. Cost
indicates a call with cost tracking. All others are semantic types.

The first three classes are exclusive but the others can be mixed in
with each other.

Attributes relevant to each span type follow.

inner_classes.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.RECORDING

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.RECORDING.SPAN_NAME_PREFIX
documentation: Span name will end with app name.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.RECORDING.APP_ID
documentation: Id of the app being recorded.

Attributes and span name relevant to the recording span type.

Note that this span is created every time a TruLens app enters a
recording context even if it is not called. In such cases, there will be
a RECORDING span without a RECORD_ROOT.

inner_classes.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.SEMANTIC
documentation: Attributes relevant to all semantic span types.

inner_classes.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.UNKNOWN
documentation: Attributes relevant for spans that could not be categorized otherwise.

inner_classes.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.RECORD_ROOT

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.RECORD_ROOT.SPAN_NAME_PREFIX
documentation: Span name will end with app name.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.RECORD_ROOT.APP_NAME
documentation: Name of the app for whom this is the root.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.RECORD_ROOT.APP_VERSION
documentation: Version of the app for whom this is the root.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.RECORD_ROOT.TOTAL_COST
documentation:
Total cost of the record.

Note that child spans might include cost type spans. This is the sum of
all those costs.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.RECORD_ROOT.MAIN_INPUT
documentation: Main input to the app.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.RECORD_ROOT.MAIN_OUTPUT
documentation: Main output of the app.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.RECORD_ROOT.MAIN_ERROR
documentation:
Main error of the app.

Exclusive with main output.

Attributes for the root span of a record.

Includes most fields carried over from
[trulens.core.schema.base.Record][trulens.core.schema.base.Record].

inner_classes.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.EVAL_ROOT

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.EVAL_ROOT.TARGET_RECORD_ID
documentation: Record id of the record being evaluated.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.EVAL_ROOT.TARGET_TRACE_ID
documentation: Trace id of the root span of the record being evaluated.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.EVAL_ROOT.TARGET_SPAN_ID
documentation: Span id of the root span of the record being evaluated.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.EVAL_ROOT.FEEDBACK_NAME
documentation: Name of the feedback definition being evaluated.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.EVAL_ROOT.FEEDBACK_DEFINITION_ID
documentation: Id of the feedback definition being evaluated.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.EVAL_ROOT.STATUS
documentation:
Status of the evaluation.

See [trulens.core.schema.feedback.FeedbackResult.status][trulens.core.schema.feedback.FeedbackResult.status] for values.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.EVAL_ROOT.TOTAL_COST
documentation:
Cost of the evaluation.

Note that sub spans might contain cost type spans. This is the sum of
all those costs.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.EVAL_ROOT.ERROR
documentation: Error raised during evaluation.

Attributes for the root span of a feedback evaluation.

Includes most of the fields carried over from
[trulens.core.schema.feedback.FeedbackResult][trulens.core.schema.feedback.FeedbackResult].

inner_classes.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.COST

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.COST.COST
documentation:
Cost of the span.

JSONization of
[trulens.core.schema.base.Cost][trulens.core.schema.base.Cost].
Attributes for spans with a cost.

inner_classes.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.RECORD

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.RECORD.APP_IDS
documentation: Ids of apps that were tracing this span.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.RECORD.RECORD_IDS
documentation: Map of app id to record id.
Attributes for spans traced as part of a recording.

inner_classes.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.CALL

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.CALL.SPAN_NAME_PREFIX
documentation: Span name will end with the function name.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.CALL.CALL_ID
documentation: Unique identifier for the call.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.CALL.STACK
documentation: Call stack.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.CALL.SIGNATURE
documentation:
Signature of the function being tracked.

Serialization of[inspect.Signature][inspect.Signature].

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.CALL.FUNCTION
documentation:
Function being tracked.

Serialized from
[trulens.core.utils.pyschema.FunctionOrMethod][trulens.core.utils.pyschema.FunctionOrMethod].

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.CALL.CLASS
documentation:
Class owning this function if it is a method.

Serialized from
[trulens.core.utils.pyschema.Class][trulens.core.utils.pyschema.Class].

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.CALL.ARGS
documentation:
Arguments of the function.

Serialized using
[trulens.core.utils.json.jsonify][trulens.core.utils.json.jsonify]. If
the function was a method, self will NOT be included in this list.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.CALL.KWARGS
documentation:
Keyword arguments of the function.

Serialized using [trulens.core.utils.json.jsonify][trulens.core.utils.json.jsonify].

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.CALL.BOUND_ARGUMENTS
documentation:
Bindings of the function if arguments were able to be bound.

Self is not included. Serialized from
[trulens.core.utils.pyschema.BoundArguments][trulens.core.utils.pyschema.BoundArguments].

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.CALL.RETURN
documentation:
Return value of the function if it executed without error.

Serialized using [trulens.core.utils.json.jsonify][trulens.core.utils.json.jsonify].

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.CALL.ERROR
documentation:
Error raised by the function if it executed with an error.

Serialized using [str][builtins.str].

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.CALL.PROCESS_ID
documentation:
Process ID.

Integer.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.CALL.THREAD_ID
documentation:
Thread ID.

Integer.
Instrumented method call attributes.

inner_classes.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.RETRIEVAL

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.RETRIEVAL.QUERY_TEXT
documentation: Input text whose related contexts are being retrieved.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.RETRIEVAL.QUERY_EMBEDDING
documentation: Embedding of the input text.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.RETRIEVAL.DISTANCE_TYPE
documentation: Distance function used for ranking contexts.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.RETRIEVAL.NUM_CONTEXTS
documentation: The number of contexts requested, not necessarily retrieved.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.RETRIEVAL.RETRIEVED_CONTEXTS
documentation: The retrieved contexts.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.RETRIEVAL.RETRIEVED_SCORES
documentation: The scores of the retrieved contexts.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.RETRIEVAL.RETRIEVED_EMBEDDINGS
documentation: The embeddings of the retrieved contexts.
A retrieval.

inner_classes.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.RERANKING

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.RERANKING.QUERY_TEXT
documentation: The query text.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.RERANKING.MODEL_NAME
documentation: The model name of the reranker.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.RERANKING.TOP_N
documentation: The number of contexts to rerank.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.RERANKING.INPUT_CONTEXT_TEXTS
documentation: The contexts being reranked.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.RERANKING.INPUT_CONTEXT_SCORES
documentation: The scores of the input contexts.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.RERANKING.OUTPUT_RANKS
documentation: Reranked indexes into `input_context_texts`.
A reranker call.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.GENERATION.MODEL_NAME
documentation: The model name of the LLM.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.GENERATION.MODEL_TYPE
documentation: The type of model used.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.GENERATION.INPUT_TOKEN_COUNT
documentation: The number of tokens in the input.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.GENERATION.INPUT_MESSAGES
documentation: The prompt given to the LLM.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.GENERATION.OUTPUT_TOKEN_COUNT
documentation: The number of tokens in the output.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.GENERATION.OUTPUT_MESSAGES
documentation: The returned text.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.GENERATION.TEMPERATURE
documentation: The temperature used for generation.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.GENERATION.COST
documentation: The cost of the generation.

inner_classes.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.MEMORIZATION

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.MEMORIZATION.MEMORY_TYPE
documentation: The type of memory.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.MEMORIZATION.REMEMBERED
documentation: The text being integrated into the memory in this span.
A memory saving call.

inner_classes.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.EMBEDDING

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.EMBEDDING.INPUT_TEXT
documentation: The text being embedded.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.EMBEDDING.MODEL_NAME
documentation: The model name of the embedding model.

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.EMBEDDING.EMBEDDING
documentation: The embedding of the input text.
An embedding call.

inner_classes.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.TOOL_INVOCATION

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.TOOL_INVOCATION.DESCRIPTION
documentation: The description of the tool.
A tool invocation.

inner_classes.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.AGENT_INVOCATION

class_variables.name: trulens.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.AGENT_INVOCATION.DESCRIPTION
documentation: The description of the agent.
An agent invocation.

Names of keys in the attributes field of a span.

In some cases below, we also include span name or span name prefix.
